General.Name: Fangzhou Inc
General.Description: Fangzhou Inc. provides online chronic disease management services in China. It operates through four segments: Online Retail Pharmacy Services; Comprehensive Medical Services; Wholesale; and Customized Content And Marketing Solutions. The company offers services through online chronic disease management platform to address the needs of patients with chronic disease, such as hypertension, cardiovascular and respiratory chronic diseases. It also provides H2H services, including online medical consultation services, e-prescription, and prescription refill services through mobile application; and healthcare products through online retail pharmacy service platform; as well as operates hospitals. Fangzhou Inc. has a strategic collaboration with Youcare Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. to accelerate the digital transformation and enhancement of chronic disease services through the application of artificial intelligence. Fangzhou Inc. was founded in 2015 and is based in Guangzhou, China.
General.Address: Building S, Kehui Jingu, Guangzhou, China
